source: Additional fields (address, notes, etc.) can be edited after creating the contact.
target: Sehemu za ziada (anwani, maelezo, n.k.) zinaweza kuhaririwa baada ya kuunda mwasiliani.

source: All logged-in users can view this document

source: Bookmark limit reached (12). Remove a bookmark to add another.

source: This will remove all recent items. Continue?

source: This link has expired. Please ask the sender for a new link.

Address line 1, city, and country are required

source: Create a contact to get started
End time was before start time. Adjusted to 1 hour after start.
target: Muda wa mwisho ulikuwa kabla ya muda wa kuanza. Umerekebishwa hadi saa 1 baada ya kuanza.

target: Hali si halali. Lazima iwe moja ya: {0}

Upload files like contracts, proposals, or documents.
